Synthetic PP&D guidance page .hidden { display: none; } Commercial Solar Permits Updated May 8, 2026 This hidden lead-in must not be extracted. Before You Apply Confirm the property address and permit type. Prepare plan sheets and engineering documents. Permit review may take longer for historic resources. Fees and Review Targets Review targets Permit type Target Commercial solar 10 business days After Approval Print the issued permit. Schedule required inspections. Solar permit application Electrical inspections Updated January 1, 2000
